types.name: Hud
types.typeSummary: Screen-space 2D overlay drawn after World.End (same frame, before EndDrawing).

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the framebuffer with a color (screen-space HUD; uses ClearBackground).

methods.name: Text
methods.signature: void Text(string text, int x, int y, int fontSize, Color color)
methods.summary: Draws text in screen coordinates (HUD overlay).

methods.name: MeasureText
methods.summary: Measures text width in pixels for HUD layout.

methods.name: Rect
methods.signature: void Rect(int x, int y, int width, int height, Color color)
methods.summary: Filled axis-aligned rectangle in screen space.

methods.name: RectOutline
methods.signature: void RectOutline(int x, int y, int width, int height, Color color)
methods.summary: Outlined axis-aligned rectangle in screen space.

methods.name: RectF
methods.summary: Filled rectangle from a RectangleF in screen space.

methods.name: Line
methods.signature: void Line(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, Color color)

methods.name: Circle
methods.signature: void Circle(int centerX, int centerY, float radius, Color color)

methods.name: DrawTexture
methods.signature: void DrawTexture(Texture texture, int x, int y, Color tint)
methods.summary: Draws a texture at screen position with tint.

methods.name: DrawTexturePro
methods.signature: void DrawTexturePro(Texture texture, RectangleF source, RectangleF dest, Vector2 origin, float rotation, Color tint)
methods.body: Textures.DrawPro(texture, source, dest, origin, rotation, tint)
methods.summary: Draws a texture region into a destination rectangle (HUD sprites).

methods.name: Fps
methods.summary: Draws frames-per-second counter at screen position.
